products.name: WSL 5M LED Strip Lights with Remote
products.hook: Room ko banaye vibrant! Budget mein lighting upgrade!
products.pain: Ghar dull lagta hai? Mood lighting chahiye but expensive hai?
products.fix: Transform your room's ambiance effortlessly with these affordable, easy-to-install LED strip lights.
products.loot_reason: Room makeover itne kam mein! Har koi khareedega!

products.name: Noise ColorFit Pulse 3 Smart Watch
products.hook: Style, fitness, notifications...sab ek wrist par! Grab this deal!
products.pain: Missed calls, health tracking mushkil, wrist pe kuch cool nahi?
products.fix: Track fitness, get notifications, and flaunt style with this feature-packed smartwatch.
products.loot_reason: Aisa feature-packed smartwatch is price par dream lagta hai! Unbelievable loot!

products.name: Logitech B170 Wireless Mouse
products.hook: Wireless Mouse chahie? Logitech pe 44% OFF! Best Buy!
products.pain: Laptop ke saath wired mouse se ho pareshan?
products.fix: Logitech ka reliable wireless mouse, smooth control aur ergonomic design ke saath.
products.loot_reason: Branded wireless mouse, is price mein superb value hai.

products.name: Story@Home 144 TC 100% Cotton Double Bedsheet
products.hook: Ghar ke liye best! Cotton Bedsheet, 58% discount pe!
products.pain: Purani bedsheet phati ya uncomfortable hai?
products.fix: Soft 100% cotton ki bedsheet se bedroom ko do naya look aur aaram.
products.loot_reason: Daily use ki cheez pe itna discount, paisa vasool deal!

products.name: Pigeon by Stovekraft Amaze Plus Induction Base Non-Stick Aluminium Kadai
products.hook: Kitchen upgrade? Non-stick Kadai, perfect deal aayi hai!
products.pain: Khana chipak jaata hai ya zyada tel lagta hai pakane mein?
products.fix: Healthy cooking ke liye ideal, induction friendly non-stick kadai ab pocket-friendly price par.
products.loot_reason: Rozmarra ke istemal ke liye shandaar deal, itne kam mein kahin nahi milega!

products.name: Mi Smart Band 6 with AMOLED Display
products.hook: OMG! Mi Band 6 ki price crash! Fitness tracking ab super easy!
products.pain: Want to track fitness but fancy smartwatches are too bulky/expensive.
products.fix: Track every step, sleep cycle, and notification with this stylish, feature-packed smart band.
products.loot_reason: Mi ka iconic smart band itne bade discount par, mauka haath se na jaane do!

products.name: pTron Bassbuds Duo in-Ear True Wireless Headphones
products.hook: Sabse saste TWS! pTron Bassbuds Duo, daily use ke liye best!
products.pain: Expensive earbuds out of budget? Need reliable audio for calls and music.
products.fix: Get crystal-clear audio and hassle-free wireless convenience without overspending.
products.loot_reason: ₹499 mein reliable TWS? Market mein isse sasta aur accha nahi milega!

products.name: boAt Rockerz 255 Pro+ Bluetooth Earphones
products.hook: boAt Rockerz 73% OFF! Sirf aaj, jaldi grab karo!
products.pain: Poor sound, tangled wires, charging woes for your daily music.
products.fix: Upgrade to boAt's powerful, long-lasting wireless sound at an unbelievable price.
products.loot_reason: Is price pe boAt ke top-selling earphones! Don't miss this one-day deal.

products.name: Pigeon by Stovekraft Amaze Plus Induction Base Aluminium Pressure Cooker, 3 Litre
products.hook: Ghar ke liye best deal! Pigeon Pressure Cooker, budget mein!
products.pain: Khana banane mein time lagta hai? Purana cooker reliable nahi?
products.fix: Induction compatible, safe aur fast cooking, har kitchen ki zaroorat!
products.loot_reason: Iss quality aur brand par itna discount daily nahi milta.

products.name: boAt Airdopes 141 Bluetooth TWS Earbuds
products.hook: Limited stock! boAt Airdopes 78% off! Abhi lo, warna regret!
products.pain: Wires se tang ho? Ya low-quality audio se mood off hota hai?
products.fix: Superb sound, long battery aur bina wires ke freedom, sab ek deal mein!
products.loot_reason: Yeh price bohot rare hai, stock out hone se pehle grab karo!

products.name: Noise ColorFit Pulse 2 Max Smartwatch
products.hook: Wow! Smartwatch deal ka baap! 🔥 Miss mat karna!
products.pain: Purani watch se bore ho gaye? Ya fit rehne ki motivation nahi mil rahi?
products.fix: Ye smartwatch sab track karegi, stylish bhi hai aur price toh loot hai!
products.loot_reason: History ka lowest price! Aisi deal phir nahi milegi.
